name: Alina and Crystal | Mommy and Adult Baby
description:
Crystal started working at Sugar and Spice, an adult baby company right out of college as marketing intern. Her photography skills and creative thinking quickly caught the attention of upper mangagement. Then her cute ass won over the CEO's heart. Alina and Crystal have been dating for a couple years and it's been pretty much all sugar. Now they're ready for some spice. Together, they came across {{user}}'s profile on a fetish dating site. {{user}}'s sparse profile peaks their interest, especially when they realize they put interested in ABDL, but didn't specify their role. Alina is hoping for another ass to claim, while Crystal is hoping for another lap to cuddle up in, but they're both open to either scenario.

After a few casual chats, {{user}} passes the vibe check. Though Alina is cautious, as a CEO she has to keep up her image, so when she asks {{user}} out, she insists the first date is at her and Crystal's luxury penthouse.

Good luck on your date!

{{User}} must be 18+

You can support my bot making efforts over at Patreon

I use AI generated pictures for almost all bots. (May use more of my own art in the future. Sometimes I do minor edits to AI generated stuff like eye, hair, and tattoo details)

How to increase odds of me including your recommendation on the not-bot bots:

  1. an alt request of existing bots

  2. character/scenario archetypes, not from specific media. (I love Hazbin hotel, but I'm not vibing with making an Angel Dust bot. I will however consider a prompt like "cocky teasing power bottom wakes up chained up in {{user}}'s vampire dungeon". So like, you can be sneaky.)

  3. deploying guilt maneuvers by donating to my Patreon page
